scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --compatibility-date=2026-05-30
scripts.pages:dev:admin: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --compatibility-date=2026-05-30 --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 8788 --binding CARD_ADMIN_TOKEN=$CARD_ADMIN_TOKEN
scripts.pages:dev:hotmail: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --compatibility-date=2026-05-30 --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 8788 --binding HOTMAIL_API_BASE=$HOTMAIL_API_BASE --binding HOTMAIL_API_KEY=$HOTMAIL_API_KEY
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name xyz-daily
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name xyz-daily --branch preview
